messages.content: 翻译：本文围绕 Kaggle 股票涨跌预测任务，构建了一套从数据分析、针对性预处理，到时间序列基础模型微调与长周期推理的完整方法流程。整体设计遵循 Kronos 提出的时间序列离散化与自回归建模思想，并针对金融时间序列在实际应用中表现出的非平稳性、长尾分布以及长预测窗口等问题进行了系统性改进。本节将依次介绍数据特性分析、预处理策略、模型微调方法以及 30 天自回归推理机制。

This paper focuses on the Kaggle stock price movement prediction task and develops a complete methodology pipeline covering data analysis, targeted preprocessing, fine-tuning of a baseline time-series model, and long-horizon inference. The overall design follows Kronos’s approach of time-series discretization and autoregressive modeling, and introduces systematic improvements to address issues commonly observed in real-world financial time series, such as non-stationarity, long-tailed distributions, and long prediction windows. This section will sequentially present the data characteristics analysis, preprocessing strategies, model fine-tuning methods, and the 30-day autoregressive inference mechanism.

翻译本次任务的目标是基于历史股票日线数据（Open、High、Low、Close、Volume），预测测试集中 5000 只股票在指定日期之后 30 天的价格涨跌方向。训练数据时间跨度覆盖 1962 年至 2024 年，不同历史阶段的市场结构和价格分布存在显著差异，表现出明显的分布漂移（Regime Shift）。此外，训练集截止于 2024-09-23，而预测目标对应 2024-11-04 之后的价格走势，中间存在一个多月的时间断层，进一步增加了预测难度。

The goal of this task is to use historical daily stock data (Open, High, Low, Close, Volume) to predict the price movement direction over the 30 days following a specified date for 5,000 stocks in the test set. The training data spans from 1962 to 2024, and market structures and price distributions differ substantially across historical periods, exhibiting pronounced distribution drift (regime shifts). In addition, the training set ends on 2024-09-23, while the prediction target corresponds to price movements after 2024-11-04, leaving a gap of more than one month, which further increases the difficulty of forecasting.

```latex
\paragraph{Price Distribution Characteristics}
As shown in Fig.~\ref{fig:price_distribution}, a statistical analysis of the closing-price distribution in the training set indicates a pronounced long-tail distribution. On the original linear scale, a large fraction of samples concentrates in the low-price range, while a small number of high-priced stocks form a clear long tail; the mean is significantly higher than the median, reflecting strong skewness. On the logarithmic scale, the distribution becomes closer to a bell-shaped form, yet differences spanning multiple orders of magnitude still remain.

Further interval-based statistics show that most stock prices fall within the \$0.1\$--\$10\$ range, which includes a large number of penny stocks, while another subset lies in the \$10\$--\$100\$ range or even higher. The price scale across different stocks can differ by tens or even hundreds of times. This pronounced heterogeneity suggests that if a single unified modeling strategy is applied to all stocks directly, the training process will inevitably be dominated by high-priced stocks or extreme values, thereby weakening the model’s ability to capture relative change patterns for low-priced stocks.
```

\paragraph{时间覆盖与缺失情况}
如图~\ref{fig:time_coverage} 所示，并非所有股票都具有完整的历史数据。一部分股票上市时间较晚，另一部分股票在历史过程中存在退市或长期停牌情况，导致时间序列长度不一致。此外，如图~\ref{fig:missing_values} 所示，早期数据中部分成交量特征存在缺失或为零的情况。这些现象表明，简单的统一填充或截断策略可能破坏时间序列的真实结构，需要采用更加谨慎的处理方式。

```latex
\paragraph{Time Coverage and Missingness}
As shown in Fig.~\ref{fig:time_coverage}, not all stocks have complete historical records. Some stocks were listed later, while others experienced delisting or prolonged trading halts over time, resulting in inconsistent time-series lengths. In addition, as illustrated in Fig.~\ref{fig:missing_values}, parts of the early data exhibit missing or zero values in the trading-volume feature. These observations suggest that naive, uniform imputation or truncation may distort the true structure of the time series, and therefore a more careful handling strategy is required.
```

\paragraph{时间覆盖与缺失情况}
如图~\ref{fig:time_coverage} 所示，并非所有股票都具有完整的历史数据。一部分股票上市时间较晚，另一部分股票在历史过程中存在退市或长期停牌情况，导致时间序列长度不一致。此外，如图~\ref{fig:missing_values} 所示，早期数据中部分成交量特征存在缺失或为零的情况。这些现象表明，简单的统一填充或截断策略可能破坏时间序列的真实结构，需要采用更加谨慎的处理方式。

```latex
\paragraph{Time Coverage and Missingness}
As shown in Fig.~\ref{fig:time_coverage}, not all stocks have complete historical records. Some stocks were listed later, while others were delisted or experienced prolonged trading halts during their history, resulting in time series of varying lengths. In addition, as illustrated in Fig.~\ref{fig:missing_values}, parts of the early data contain missing or zero values in the trading volume feature. These phenomena indicate that simple, uniform imputation or truncation may damage the true structure of the time series, and a more cautious processing strategy is therefore required.
```

\subsection{数据预处理动机}
上述数据分析表明，本任务所涉及的金融时间序列在价格尺度、时间覆盖以及数据完整性方面均存在显著异质性。不同股票之间的价格分布呈现出明显的长尾特征，价格量级差异可达数十倍甚至数百倍；同时，并非所有股票都具有完整且连续的历史记录，早期数据中还存在一定比例的缺失值与异常波动。这些特性使得直接对原始数据进行建模面临较大的稳定性风险。
如果忽略上述问题，模型训练过程可能被极端价格值或高价股票主导，从而削弱对低价股票相对变化模式的学习能力；此外，不合理的缺失值填充方式还可能引入人为噪声，破坏时间序列的真实结构。因此，在将金融时间序列输入模型之前，有必要对数据进行针对性的预处理，以消除不同股票之间的尺度差异，并降低异常值和数据缺失对模型训练的干扰。
另一方面，金融市场具有显著的非平稳性，市场结构和价格行为会随时间发生变化。相较于较早时期的数据，数年前甚至十年前的历史信息对当前短期趋势预测的参考价值有限，过长时间跨度的数据反而可能引入与当前市场风格不一致的模式，从而干扰模型学习。因此，本文在构建训练数据时，仅选取 2022-11-04 至 2024-09-23 期间的历史数据，以引导模型更加专注于近期市场环境下的价格动态特征。
基于上述考虑，本文在预处理阶段重点围绕两个目标展开：一是通过按股票独立的标准化策略，使模型关注于价格的相对变化而非绝对水平；二是通过鲁棒的异常值处理方式，缓解长尾分布对模型训练稳定性的影响。相应的预处理流程将在下一小节中详细介绍。

```latex
\subsection{Motivation for Data Preprocessing}
The above analysis shows that the financial time series in this task exhibit substantial heterogeneity in price scale, temporal coverage, and data completeness. Across stocks, the price distribution displays a pronounced long-tail pattern, with price magnitudes differing by tens or even hundreds of times. Meanwhile, not all stocks have complete and continuous historical records, and the early data contain a certain proportion of missing values and abnormal fluctuations. These characteristics make modeling the raw data directly prone to instability.

If these issues are ignored, model training may be dominated by extreme price values or high-priced stocks, thereby weakening the model’s ability to learn relative change patterns for low-priced stocks. Moreover, improper missing-value imputation can introduce artificial noise and distort the true structure of the time series. Therefore, before feeding financial time series into the model, it is necessary to perform targeted preprocessing to remove cross-stock scale differences and reduce the interference of outliers and missing data during training.

On the other hand, financial markets are highly non-stationary: market structure and price behavior evolve over time. Compared with more recent periods, historical information from several years ago—or even a decade ago—has limited value for predicting current short-term trends; using overly long time spans may instead introduce patterns inconsistent with the current market regime and thus hinder model learning. For this reason, when constructing the training set, we only use historical data from 2022-11-04 to 2024-09-23, so that the model focuses more on price dynamics under the recent market environment.

Based on these considerations, the preprocessing stage in this work centers on two main goals: (1) applying per-stock normalization so that the model focuses on relative price changes rather than absolute levels; and (2) adopting robust outlier handling to mitigate the impact of the long-tail distribution on training stability. The corresponding preprocessing pipeline is described in detail in the next subsection.
```
